snippet.title: The Weeknd - The Weeknd Б─⌠ Save Your Tears (Live on The 2021 Billboard Music Awards)
snippet.description:
Б─°Save Your TearsБ─² (Live at The 2021 Billboard Music Awards) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD 

Б√╨Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 

Б√╨Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 

Б√╨Follow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Alex Lill
Produced by Brendan Garrett
Production Company:  Bucket Pictures 

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)

snippet.title: AGUERO FAIRYTALE AT THE ETIHAD | Man City 5-0 Everton Highlights
snippet.description:
Sergio Aguero came off the bench to score twice as City thrashed Everton 5-0 as the champions ended the Premier League campaign in style.
Kevin De Bruyne started the rout in the first-half with Gabriel Jesus quickly adding another.

Phil Foden wrapped up the three points after the re-start before Aguero's magical cameo saw him score twice in five minutes.

Match Report can be read here: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/manchester-city-v-everton-match-report-23-may-2021-63757377

localized.title: AGUERO FAIRYTALE AT THE ETIHAD | Man City 5-0 Everton Highlights
localized.description:
Sergio Aguero came off the bench to score twice as City thrashed Everton 5-0 as the champions ended the Premier League campaign in style.
Kevin De Bruyne started the rout in the first-half with Gabriel Jesus quickly adding another.

Phil Foden wrapped up the three points after the re-start before Aguero's magical cameo saw him score twice in five minutes.

In those terms of agreement,

Surveillances outside, we see when you arrive,
Ride or die my son.

snippet.title: SUADERO DE TAQUERIA AUTц┴NTICO
snippet.description:
Tal y como los hacen en la taquerцґa, hoy vamos a hacer tacos de suadero con todo y su salsa. SI. Para quienes nos ven desde ciudad satц╘lite, si es el. Es Julio de la taquerцґa "tacos la hija del tцґo"
Julio representa las personas que mц║s amamos en ц╘ste paцґs: nuestros taqueros. Tanto tц╨ como yo ya tenemos a nuestro taquero de cabecera, el que nos atiende y nos conoce, y el que cada vez que vamos nos da los tacos tal y como nos gusta, con el sazцЁn y sabor que queremos y que cada vez que vamos no nos defrauda. 
Pues hoy Julio nos enseц╠цЁ cцЁmo hace sus tacos, y son tan fц║ciles como lцЁgicos. La lцЁgica de Julio es darle al comensal una carne que sepa a lo que es: CARNE. 
Por lo tanto usa ingredientes de la mejor calidad sin ponerles nada mц║s que ajo y sal, para que la carne sepa a lo que debe de saber. A carne!!

Si andan por satц╘lite y quieren visitar a Julio sцЁlo es cosa de que pongas en google o en waze "TACOS LA HIJA DEL Tц█O" estц║ en avenida fuentes de satц╘lite #202 Colonia Santa Cruz del monte

Voy a estar posteando videos en facebook de cцЁmo hice yo el mismo suadero en sartц╘n porque es importante decirlo: NO ES NECESARIA LA CHORICERA, quedan igualmente deliciosos en sartц╘n (no lo hago con la misma agilidad que Julio pero de que salen, salen)

ingredientes: 
Suadero: lo cortцЁ en las capas que vienen en bisteces (el suadero es RES)
ajo
sal
manteca vegetal

Salsa:
tomate verde 1 kilo
100 gramos de chile de arbol asado
sal
cebolla
ajo

Julio llevцЁ las tortillas de taquero, y obvio se requiere cebolla y cilantro y limones. El hizo 4 kilos y salieron como 45, 50 taquitos. La verdad esos tacos no vieron la luz del dцґa siguiente. 
Quц╘ orgullo me da poder mostrarle al mundo una de nuestras delicias gastronцЁmicas. Si estц║s en el extranjero y extraц╠as, enseц╠ale al carnicero quц╘ parte quieres de la res.
Consejo chilango: la torta de suadero pero yo no la hice, comi tacos desde el primero hasta que se terminцЁ la carne, taco tras taco, enchilada tras enchilada, kilos y kilos de limцЁn, y cervezas tras cervezas, fuц╘ como la navidad del suadero, como mi cumpleaц╠os, como mi dцґa favorito
TE AMO JULIO!
#midiafavorito #juliomylove #tacosdesuadero

Letras:

Trote
A dentro CR7 haciц╘ndome emotes (Prrrr)
Un solo plomazo y te hago un bobote(Wooo, Wooo)

Y le doy 7,0 y lo mado palБ─≥ bote

Tu quiere jugar conmigo
Yo ando en partida sin usar CR7
Ya tu sabe lo que pasa
Pila eБ─≥ plomo se te mete

Jugando FREE FIRE en el bloque
Con el carro sin marbete
No te metas que te chocamos
PaБ─≥ que maБ─≥ nunca me rete

CR7 Quцґtate ese CR7
(Wooo, Wooo)
Te doy con la MP40 
O con la AK47 (Prrrra)

CR7 quцґtate ese CR7
Te doy con la MP40 (Yeah)
O con la AK47 
(Wooo, Wooo)

Ganga Ganga
Porque frenas con tu banda 
Tu anda con el mono (Yeah)
PoБ─≥ frena que yo ando con el oso panda

En la garita con la franco 
EБ─≥ que yo mato toБ─≥ eso manco (Prrrra)
Que me lo traiga la zona
Tu sabe que no me tranco (Wooo, Wooo)

CR7 Quцґtate ese CR7 (Prrrra)
Te doy con la MP40
O con la AK47 
(Wooo, Wooo)

CR7 quitate ese CR7(Prrrra)
Te doy con la MP40
O con la AK47

Dale parcero caцґ de primero

Tu puedes frenarme con tu coro entero
Yo siempre ando solo yo no soy ganguero 

Vengan tirando todas sus paredes
Con G18 le doy que se muere
Y si saco la SCARD 
Hay si eБ─≥ verdad 
Que conmigo no pueden

Porque activaste ese CR7 (Prrrra) Cogiste miedo 
En Free Fire no existe cohete (Wooo, Wooo)
Y si existiera yo se que tu lo cogieras 
Porque sin ese CR7 te mata cualquiera

CR7 Quitate ese CR7
Te doy con la MP40
O con la AK47

CR7 Quitate ese CR7 (Gang, Gang, Gang)
Te doy con la MP40
O con la AK47 (Prrr, PaБ─≥)

AaaaaaБ─≥

snippet.title: Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem
Stream/DL: https://atlantic.lnk.to/HeartbreakAnthemID

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

Follow Galantis
Facebook: http://smarturl.it/GalantisFb
Twitter: http://smarturl.it/GalantisTw
Instagram: http://smarturl.it/GalantisInsta

Follow David Guetta
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DavidGuetta
Twitter: https://twitter.com/davidguetta
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/davidguetta/

Follow Little Mix
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LittleMix
Twitter: https://twitter.com/LittleMix
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/littlemix/

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, itБ─≥s me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I donБ─≥t hold no grudges, promise this ainБ─≥t a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donБ─≥t
Maybe weБ─≥ll fix this or maybe we wonБ─≥t 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainБ─≥t a heartbreak anthem, I donБ─≥t care what happened but I ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it 
DonБ─≥t want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it 
And I donБ─≥t wanna feel, I donБ─≥t wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainБ─≥t a heartbreak anthem, I donБ─≥t care what happened, but I ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, itБ─≥s me your ex (again)
I didnБ─≥t want to call but thereБ─≥s this pain in my chest
And thanks to you IБ─≥m wearing out this bulletproof vest but IБ─≥ll be ok, IБ─≥m ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it donБ─≥t
Maybe weБ─≥ll fix this or maybe we wonБ─≥t 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ainБ─≥t a heartbreak anthem, I donБ─≥t care what happened but I ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it 
DonБ─≥t want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it 
And I donБ─≥t wanna feel, I donБ─≥t wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ainБ─≥t a heartbreak anthem, I donБ─≥t care what happened, but I ainБ─≥t got no time to dwell on it.

Three working-class boys attend one of the most exclusive schools in Spain, where the clash with the kids of the elite ends in tragedy.

Netflix is the world's leading Internet entertainment service. snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Saturday (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.
Stream / Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Ooh you're good.
These are my dancing shoes.
We paint the town.
Ooh you're good.
Thought I would dance with you.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

(Feeling great)
Life moves slow on the ocean floor.
(Feeling great)
I can't feel the waves anymore.
Did the tide forget to move?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! Б√╨Б√╨ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! Б√╨Б√╨ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donБ─≥t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamБ─≥s safe and try to crack open your opponentsБ─≥. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youБ─≥re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support Б─■ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3pt FG with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 points (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 rebounds in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketballБ─≥s best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, youБ─≥ll be able to call your shot! 

If youБ─≥re more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

snippet.title: El asesinato de una mujer pudo desencadenar el motцґn en una cц║rcel de Guatemala | Noticias Telemundo
snippet.description:

Noticias Telemundo Mediodцґa es un programa con un estilo ц╨nico de narrar las noticias, de una manera atractiva y perspicaz. snippet.description:

Pa Б─≤ la calle vamos al П÷▓╞ hay que prenderla tц╨ sabe con toБ─≥ lo hierro apagando Vela . (Eh) tц╨ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se estц║ buscando ahora agrц╘gale que suena .

Voy Pa Б─≤ la calle hoy en alta , no se cuando regreso , siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con palБ─≥ de peso . Voy Pa la calle hoy , voy paБ─≥ la calle hoy.... voy paБ─≥ la calle hoy ...(X2)

PaБ─≥ la calle voy normal siempre ando con pal de peso menol yo lo joceaba siempre estoy puesto PaБ─≥ eso nunca me detuvieron ni coro era travieso tamo activo en la Avenida Dando saco eБ─≥ cabra (EL HUESO).

Toy burlao la humildad es que no se pierde careta Pa Б─≤ lo caretuse el que se quilla pierde rulin de verdad mezclo toБ─≥ en el mismo vaso cuando toyБ─≥ medio mariao empezamos a beber al paso paБ─≥ la calle son al П÷▓╞ hay que prenderla tц╨ sabe con toБ─≥ lo hierro apagando vela , tц╨ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se ta buscando ahora agrц╘gale que suena . 


                       MOZART 
PaБ─≥ la calle voy toy cansado de estar en la casa otra resaca pero en eso se me pasa de que vale tener pila de cuarto si usted no goza hay veces que uno manga palБ─≥ de peso y lo explota un flow nuevo un cerquillo es suficiente yo me quito y me pongo cuando vuelvo doy corriente yo soy de un barrio pero de un barrio caliente y a mi no me de muela que yo tengo mi Expediente.
Si el sol sale me acuesto la para dando la para paБ─≥ la calle yo estoy puesto la fila de los party mцґo son como la del metro ven vakeame lo perro de los pies que estoy en retro .
